channel.title: [JSNation Live Conference] Talk + Frontity Live Demos
channel.description:
[JSNationLive](https://live.jsnation.com/) starts today and we are very happy to be sponsoring it for the first time!
Today, we're giving a **talk and hosting a few live demos** so you can learn more about Frontity. Check out our blog post below for more details:
https://frontity.org/blog/were-sponsoring-jsnation-live-2020/?utm_source=forum&utm_medium=jsnation-sponsorship-post&utm_campaign=content_marketing
We look forward to seeing you at the JSNation Live! 🙂
P.S. Get your free ticket here: https://live.jsnation.com/.

item.title: [JSNation Live Conference] Talk + Frontity Live Demos
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
JSNationLive starts today and we are very happy to be sponsoring it for the first time!

Today, we’re giving a talk and hosting a few live demos so you can learn more about Frontity. Check out our blog post below for more details:

Frontity – 17 Jun 20

We're sponsoring JSNation Live 2020!

We're very happy to be sponsoring this year's JSNation Live (June 18-19). Here's everything you need to know about Frontity's presence at the conference!

We look forward to seeing you at the JSNation Live!

P.S. Get your free ticket here: https://live.jsnation.com/.

Read full topic
item.source: [JSNation Live Conference] Talk + Frontity Live Demos
